nodes.label: Audited Volition Method (G0-G6 gates)
nodes.rationale: Extracted method from F2 Immunity session: context reading before planning, pre-registering decisions/risks, fail-closed skepticism, TDD red-green, evidence-based verification — discipline not special architecture

nodes.label: Discipline Meta-Prompt (Mechanical Engineering Rigor)
nodes.rationale: Model-agnostic system prompt: ground truth phase, dependency-ordered decomposition, contract-before-mechanism TDD, continuous invariant gates

nodes.label: Operating Directive: Adversarial Evidence-Gated Engineer
nodes.rationale: Evidence before assertion; symmetric distrust; context explosion; standing constraints as invariants
